content.en:
"Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, do you really want to continue fighting?"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was covered in blood, and the Blood Ancient War Spear in his hand erupted with terrifying power, knocking away the three Heavenly Ancestors who were besieging him again and again, and said coldly.

"Hand over the real dragon sudo !!!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor roared angrily.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was very helpless, these three Heavenly Ancestors had to compete with him for the True Dragon Sushien, as if they were not dying.

In this way, even if he had the hope of killing the Sycamore Heavenly Ancestor and them, he might be killed by the Sycamore Heavenly Ancestor and them, and anything could happen.

And at this time, some Heavenly Ancestors had already gathered around, and they were watching the excitement.

Seeing that Wutong Heavenly Ancestor said that the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor had the True Dragon Suji Vine on his body, some Heavenly Ancestors were ready to move, and they were eager to snatch the True Dragon Sushi vine over.

Feeling the gaze of these Heavenly Ancestors, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestors were also a little timid.

After all, he didn't want to make wedding dresses for other Heavenly Ancestors!

Rumble!!!

The void froze, and even the Heavenly Ancestors felt a terrifying aura emerge.

In an instant, a young man in black armor walked out of nothingness, his eyes red.

Seeing his arrival, all the Heavenly Ancestors were shocked.

"Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, his aura is much stronger than in the past, he has really stepped into that step!"

Many Heavenly Ancestors respectfully greeted Dongao Heavenly Ancestors one by one.

"I've seen Dongao Heavenly Ancestor!"

And at this moment, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor stopped fighting each other, and they stopped one after another.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, give half of the True Dragon Whisker to Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and them, this matter will be forgotten like this!" Dongao Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Yes!"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor didn't dare to refute, and directly took out a piece of True Dragon Whisker and gave it to the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and them.

And Wutong Heavenly Ancestor didn't dare to complain at all, and after getting the True Dragon Suteng, he directly thanked Dongao Tianzu: "Thank you Dongao Tianzu!"

Swish!

Dongao Tianzu left directly.

And the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor also left immediately, and did not enter the True Dragon Realm Ruins again, and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and they also went back to heal their injuries.

The other Heavenly Ancestors also left one after another, and disappeared in the blink of an eye.

"Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, such a powerful and powerful force, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor doesn't dare to talk nonsense!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he also knew that this was because Dongao Heavenly Ancestor's strength was too strong, surpassing other Heavenly Ancestors.

"The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor is back, maybe I can use the relationship of the Blood Ancient Ancestor to trade with the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, he may have the True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he wouldn't go to the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor now, at least until he healed.

......

Genki Territory.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor has returned, and this is his hometown after all.

After he came back, he immediately found the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

"Master!"

When the Blood Ancestor saw the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, he was immediately very excited!

The master is back, and he has a Heavenly Ancestor backing mountain, and his life will be much more comfortable in the future!

"Blood, the cultivation speed is a little slow, and you have only broken through to the fourth stage, and you haven't even stepped into the fifth stage!" the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor frowned.

"Master, not long after you left, I was sealed by a Heavenly Ancestor for endless years, and now I have only been out for a short time, so I have cultivated so slowly!"

"Oh, which Heavenly Ancestor is it?"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was furious, he dared to seal his pet, and after he recovered from his injuries, he would definitely have to trouble the other party.

"It's the White Crane Heavenly Ancestor!"

The Blood Ancestor said.

"White Crane, that old fellow!"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor frowned, then calmed down and said, "I'll talk about this matter later!"

It's not that he doesn't want to make a move, it's that the White Crane Heavenly Ancestor is stronger than him, and he doesn't dare to make trouble with the White Crane Heavenly Ancestor.

Moreover, the White Crane Heavenly Ancestor had a good relationship with many Heavenly Ancestors, even if his strength was raised to a level stronger than the White Crane Heavenly Ancestor in the future, he would not dare to trouble the White Crane Heavenly Ancestor.

"Raccoon Blood, these resources are for you, strive to be promoted to the fifth stage, otherwise it will be too embarrassing for me!" Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor took out a bunch of resources and gave them to Raccoon Blood, and said.

"Thank you, master!"

The Blood Ancestor said excitedly.

Afterwards, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor went to heal his wounds.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian contacted the Blood Ancestor.

"Endless Great Ancestor, what are you looking for me?"

The Blood Ancestor asked.

"Blood Ancestor, can you introduce the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, I want to make a deal with him!" Ye Tian said his purpose.

"Are you looking for a master?"

The Blood Ancestor hesitated, but agreed.

He also heard that Ye Tian had stepped into the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level, and his strength status was no less than that of a Heavenly Ancestor, and if he became a Heavenly Ancestor in the future, his strength would definitely be above his master.

Therefore, he also wants to befriend Ye Tian, so that he has one more backer.

His Blood Ancestor has no hope of rising, so he can only find a backer.

So, he agreed, "Endless Great Ancestor, I'll go and talk to my master." "

Subsequently.

The Blood Ancestor begged to see his master, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, and told Ye Tian about it.

"The Endless Ancestor you are talking about is a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Ancestor?"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was a little surprised, but he didn't expect that during the time he left, another Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor was born, and he also knew his pet Raccoon Blood, and the other party was now also in the Xuanqi Realm.

He thought about it, but decided to meet the other party.

The Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level knew the Raccoon Blood again, so there was no reason for him not to see it.

Not long after, Ye Tian met with the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

"I've seen the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Endless Great Ancestor!"

After the two greeted each other, they talked about the topic.

"Endless Great Ancestor, listen to the blood blood, you want to trade with me, I don't know what you want to trade?" asked the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

"True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone!"

Ye Tian said.

"True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone, it turns out that you want to trade this thing, no wonder you want to trade with me!" Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor suddenly realized, after all, this thing is only available in True Dragon Realm Ruins.

"I do have a few True Dragon Realm Ruins Stones!"

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor said.

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately extremely surprised, and immediately asked, "Is the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor willing to trade?"

"The True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone is very useful, what are you willing to exchange it for?" the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"Is it feasible to pass through the innocent gold?"

Ye Tian asked.

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor shook his head, "I can't look at it!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian said a lot of resources, but the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor couldn't look down on them.

In fact, there was a treasure on Ye Tian's body that was enough to make the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor excited, and that was Xuantian Platinum.

However, the True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone is definitely not as good as Xuantian Platinum!

It would be too stupid to trade the True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone with Xuantian Platinum.

"How about a serving of Aotaki liquid?"

Ye Tian said.

He has the Aotaki liquid formula, and he has also gathered the materials on the Aotaki liquid formula over the years, and he refined a copy some time ago.

Qinglong liquid can help the fifth stage Great Ancestor to impact the Heavenly Ancestor, but I don't know if the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor wants it?

"Aotaki liquid, this is a resource that can impact the Heavenly Ancestor, the major forces are very eager for it, are you willing to trade it?"

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.
